sakura-bloom-in-summer.name: Sakura: Bloom in Summer

findings: materialized dropped 'Attacks sequentially 10 times' (burst nuke was x1) — restored x10; S2 shipped kit-literal single 15s window (rejected unsupported 'permanent DoT' premise; no S2 cooldown in datamine)

skill1: Activates when an ally or self destroys an enemy's part. Affects self.
Activates when an ally or self destroys an enemy's part. Affects self if in Dancing Flower status.
Activates when an ally or self destroys an enemy's part. Affects all enemies who are in Sakura Petals status.

caveats: skill2: force-cast ONCE at battle start (S1) — Sakura Petals 256%/s + Dancing Flower modeled as a single 15s window (t=0–15); the part-destroy duration extensions never fire vs the partless boss, so she is a plain AR after ~t=15 until her bursts ⚑
skill2: Dancing Flower Attack Damage ▲ 15.64%/15s is time-averaged to a permanent 1.30% (engine passive buffs cannot carry a duration) ⚑
burst: 457.14% ×10 sequential attacks modeled as 10 same-frame hits vs the single boss; the stacking DoT assumes all 10 stacks apply per cast (351.6%/s ×10s) ⚑
cadence: datamined 12 pulls/s + 81-frame reload are unverified estimates ⚑
